name: Improper Following of a Certificate's Chain of Trust
description: The product does not properly follow or validate the entire chain of trust from a certificate back to a trusted root certificate authority. This breaks the certificate's ability to establish legitimate trust, potentially allowing attackers to present fraudulent certificates.
detection_pattern: Look for EXTERNAL nodes (received certificate, TLS peer certificate) that flow to AUTH nodes (trust decision, identity verification) without a CONTROL mediator (full chain-of-trust validation, root CA verification, intermediate certificate check) that walks the entire certificate chain from the presented cert up to a trusted root authority.
